stan_swiata.opis: Active US strikes on Iran continuing with Trump threatening more; Iran vows retaliation; US tanker hit in Gulf of Oman — escalation raises energy price and regional stability risks for Poland.
Ukraine continues long-range strikes deep inside Russia; conflict ongoing on Poland's eastern border with no qualitative change this cycle.
Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon kill 17; ongoing Middle East conflict entangled with Iran situation, limited direct impact on Poland.
Zelensky still under pressure to resolve WWII army unit naming dispute with Poland; diplomatic friction continues without resolution.
